LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO AUG-14-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JORDAN DESCHAMPS-BRALY, MD, FACS, AND DESCHAMPS-BRALY CLINIC OF PLASTIC & CRANIOFACIAL'S MOTION FOR UNDERTAKING [CCP 1030(A)]; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS JORDAN C. DESCHAMPS-BRALY, M.D., AND HIS CLINIC SEEK AN ORDER REQUIRING PLAINTIFF ELLE PERKINS, D.O., TO POST A BOND OR UNDERTAKING OF $100,000 TO SECURE ANY COST ORDER IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANTS. THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION IN PART AND ORDERS DR. PERKINS TO POST AN UNDERTAKING IN THE AMOUNT OF $40,000 (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING.) ORDER SUBMITTED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Undertaking [Ccp 1030(A)] (Motions)
Off Calendar Aug-14-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS JORDAN DESCHAMPS-BRALY, MD, FACS, AND DESCHAMPS-BRALY CLINIC OF PLASTIC & CRANIOFACIAL's Motion For Undertaking [Ccp 1030(A)].

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants Jordan C. Deschamps-Braly, M.D., and his clinic seek an order requiring plaintiff Elle Perkins, D.O., to post a bond or undertaking of $100,000 to secure any cost order in favor of defendants. The court grants the motion in part and orders Dr. Perkins to post an undertaking in the amount of $40,000 (see word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
